goal: Complete Bluepilot's anchor documents and add the mandatory read-order rule to AGENTS.md, adapted from the proven soulmatch/maya-core pattern and the Claude package supplied on 2026-05-31.
scope_out: Do not change code or tools.
Do not alter the WLP verifier or WLP protocol.
Do not start the builder migration in this task.
claims: AGENTS.md gains exactly one mandatory read-order section before Pflichtregeln.
docs/SESSION-LOG.md records the current red thread with BP-124 included.
STATE.md exists at the repository root and reflects the current Bluepilot state.
docs/DEPLOY_MAYA_CORE_BINDING.md documents the Maya-core URL and gate-token requirements.
The supplied Claude package is adapted for current repo state, BP-125 numbering, and valid WLP schema.
assumptions: BP-124 is already used for Maya memory server-to-server auth and must not be overwritten.
ASCII wording is preferred for Bluepilot docs because the existing repository mostly uses ASCII transliteration.
The anchor docs are documentation only and do not affect runtime behavior.
dod: AGENTS.md contains one 'Pflicht-Lesereihenfolge (ANKER-REGEL)' section before '## Pflichtregeln'.
docs/SESSION-LOG.md exists with newest entries first and includes BP-125, BP-124, BP-123, and BP-122 context.
STATE.md exists at repo root and names current main as the BP-125 anchor/read-order state after this task.
docs/DEPLOY_MAYA_CORE_BINDING.md exists and documents MAYA_CORE_URL plus MAYA_CORE_GATE_TOKEN or MAYA_BUILDER_GATE_TOKEN.

stop_conditions: Changing code or tools becomes necessary.
A new architecture decision outside the anchor/read-order docs becomes necessary.
prior_task_findings: BP-124 secured maya-core /api/maya/memory server-to-server auth. Claude supplied an anchor/read-order package using BP-124, but BP-124 is already taken; BP-125 carries the package forward with valid WLP fields and current repo facts.
